svg.text: off dev HEAD · any commit's subject
all green? → continue · fail? → fix locally
squash merge · linear history on dev
PR Approve group · re-confirm after squash
no conflict · no secrets · all _待填_ in §6
jumpbox / UAT project · run.sh dev mode
[ LOOP · Step 6 → Step 2 ] fix found → redo
[ GATE 3: PR Approve group + CR Reviewer ]
STEP 9 · raise CR with main SHA
CR-XXXXXX references main HEAD commit SHA
CR template: PR URL + CAEP tickets list
release notes = git log CAEP-x: | sort -u
prod mode: ref-use runs only if main HEAD
↑ BRANCH lanes (left) · 11 STEP blocks in 4 columns (centre) · CR lifecycle states (right) ↑
FOUR GATES — single source of truth

g.text: Step 2 — block push on any red
GATE 3 · PR Approve group on PR dev→main

svg.text: Prod release (step 11) additionally self-checks main HEAD against CR-XXXXXX SHA — refuses to run on SHA mismatch.
Order-of-operations invariant: step 9 (raise CR) MUST come AFTER step 8 (merge to main) — main HEAD SHA must exist before CR can reference it.
